title: Smart YouTube Reader Demo Digest
changes_summary: Shows a first-run proof project that teaches Smart YouTube Reader instead of relying on explanatory copy alone.
Demonstrates capture, reader context, default AI digest generation, group digest synthesis, and global Tailscale sharing.
Shows both simple text-led and premium GPT 2.0 image-led WebP infographic styles while keeping the repository lightweight.
image_policy: Bundled demo digest images are novel generated WebP teaching visuals. Each chapter includes a simple infographic and a premium GPT 2.0 image-led infographic. They are examples of the default external-agent digest deliverable and are not copied from source videos.
